prompt: Generate tasks.md from plan_file .agents/scratchpad/release-calendar-role-controls/plan.md. Use companion docs in that folder and produce a dependency-ordered, user-story-grouped task list with concrete file paths.
assertions: Contains at least 20 checklist task lines in '- [ ] T### ...' format
Task IDs are contiguous from T001 with no duplicates or gaps
Includes required phases: Setup, Foundational, at least one User Story phase, and Polish
Includes a Dependencies & Execution Order section
Includes explicit tests section(s) for user stories
Contains no unresolved template placeholders like [FEATURE NAME], [language], [framework], [endpoint], [name]
Task lines use concrete plain-text file paths (no markdown emphasis '**', no wildcard-only globs like '**/')
